testcase.name: test_03_execute_ceremony_runs_all_agents

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ceremony.py:106: in test_03_execute_ceremony_runs_all_agents assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

failure.message:

assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
